overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a hooded character exploring an arid desert landscape with large rock formations and sparse vegetation. The character walks steadily through sandy and rocky terrain, encountering a skeletal creature briefly before continuing up a hillside toward a ridge.

scene_state.functional_zone: open desert plain with scattered boulders and sparse shrubs

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through sandy desert terrain toward a prominent rock formation visible in the distance

entered.detail: tall dark rock formation rising prominently from the desert floor
low green shrubs scattered across the sandy terrain
hazy mountain peaks visible on the horizon
smaller boulders and rock piles dotting the landscape

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an open desert landscape with sandy ground and sparse vegetation. A large monolith rock formation dominates the distant center while smaller rocks and desert bushes dot the surroundings under bright midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky desert terrain approaching the monolith

events.description: ground surface transitions from sand to rocky gravel terrain

agents.ego_description: navigating around the base of the large rock formation on uneven rocky ground

entered.detail: uneven gray rock surface replacing the sandy ground
group of large gray boulders on the right side

segments.scene_description: The terrain shifts from sand to rocky gravel as the character approaches the base of the large monolith. The ground becomes uneven with scattered boulders while the massive rock formation looms closer in the center of the frame.

events.description: character approaches and observes a white skeletal creature standing on the rocks to the left

agents.ego_description: slowing to observe a skeletal creature on the left before continuing past it

notable_agents.action: skeletal creature standing motionless on the rocky terrain

entered.detail: white skeletal figure with elongated limbs standing among the rocks
sloping rocky ground leading upward toward a ridge

segments.scene_description: While navigating the rocky terrain, the character encounters a white skeletal creature standing motionless on the left. The character passes the creature and the large monolith rock, which now falls behind to the left, as the terrain begins to slope upward.

events.description: character begins ascending the rocky hillside toward the ridge line

agents.ego_description: climbing steadily up the rocky slope toward the ridge line ahead

entered.detail: rocky ridge line forming the crest of the hill ahead
scattered small trees and larger shrubs on the hillside

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a rocky hillside toward a ridge line, leaving the monolith and skeletal creature behind. Sparse desert trees appear on the left as the slope steepens, with distant mountains now visible to the left against the clear sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through an open desert that gradually transforms into a steep, rocky ascent toward a mountain ridge. It begins with the character walking across sandy ground dotted with sparse vegetation, moving steadily toward a massive monolith rock formation under the bright midday sun. As the terrain shifts from sand to uneven rocky gravel, the camera approaches the base of the looming monolith before passing a motionless white skeletal creature standing to the left. The scene then opens up as the character moves past the monolith and the creature, with the ground sloping upward and the large rock formation falling behind. Finally, the camera ascends a steep hillside past sparse desert trees, revealing distant mountains against a clear sky as the character reaches the ridge line.
